title: Mqmmw
body:
## A fun mod developed by Lan Shanzhu when bored, containing many interesting items. He doesn't change the original gameplay, only adds
## 
## 一个有趣的模组，由兰山竹在无聊时开发，包含许多有趣的物品，他不更改原版的玩法，只是增加

This mod provides several new records for playback and adds a workbench like item converter that can convert items into clay! An additional sword has been added, which can instantly kill all creatures, but can only be obtained through the creation mode or using commands

这个模组提供了几个新的唱片可供播放，新增了一个类似工作台的物品转化器，这个转换器可以将物品转换为泥土！还增加了一把剑，这把剑可以秒杀所有生物，但是只能在创造模式或使用指令获取到
